urdu transliteration text: Yeh Ghurbat e Ali hai, Ye Ghurbat e Ali hai
english translation text: This is the tragedy of Imam Ali (as)

urdu transliteration text: Haq maangne jo Zahra (2) Darbar mein gayi hai
english translation text: Zahra had to go to the Darbar to fight for her rights!

urdu transliteration text: Awaaz aa rahi hai mei binte Mustafa huBaba ke kalmagoyo mei hi to Fatimah hu
english translation text:
She called out, I am the daughter of Mustafa
Oh reciters of the Kalima, I am Fatimah

urdu transliteration text: Pehchaan ne se duniya (2) inkar kar rahi haiYe ghurbat e Ali hai
english translation text:
They all know who I am, yet they’re all denying me
- This is the tragedy of Imam Ali (as) -

urdu transliteration text: Yeh Ghurbat e Ali hai, Ye Ghurbat e Ali hai
english translation text: This is the tragedy of Imam Ali (as)

urdu transliteration text: Sun kar salam e Haider koi nahi hai ruktaWajib nahi samjhta koi jawaab dena
english translation text:
Hearing the salaam of the Imam, no one stops to reply
They don’t consider it obligatory to respond to him

urdu transliteration text: Afsoos Fatimah bhi (2) ye baat jaanti haiYe ghurbat e Ali hai
english translation text:
What a pity it is that his wife (Fatimah) knows this
- This is the tragedy of Imam Ali (as) -

urdu transliteration text: Yeh Ghurbat e Ali hai, Ye Ghurbat e Ali hai
english translation text: This is the tragedy of Imam Ali (as)

urdu transliteration text: Masjid me sar jhukaye, Mawla khare huwe haiHakim ki tohamaton ko chup chaap sun rahe hai
english translation text:
Imam is standing in the mosque, with his head lowered
Silently listening to the  false charges laid by the ruler

urdu transliteration text: Siddiqa sab ke aagey (2) jhutlaai jaa rahi haiYe ghurbat e Ali hai
english translation text:
The truthful one (Zahra) is being treated like a liar in public
- This is the tragedy of Imam Ali (as) -

urdu transliteration text: Yeh Ghurbat e Ali hai, Ye Ghurbat e Ali hai
english translation text: This is the tragedy of Imam Ali (as)

urdu transliteration text:
Kehti hai roke Zahra jaane na dungi tanhaPatke me Murtaza ke hai haat Sayyada ka
Crying softly Zahra told Imam Ali, 'I won't let you go alone'
english translation text: Whilst holding the waistband of her husband

urdu transliteration text: Aab hai kisi ka durra (2) aur dukhtar e nabi haiYe ghurbat e Ali hai
english translation text:
Now somebody lifts their hand to slap the daughter of the Prophet
- This is the tragedy of Imam Ali (as) -

urdu transliteration text: Yeh Ghurbat e Ali hai, Ye Ghurbat e Ali hai
english translation text: This is the tragedy of Imam Ali (as)

urdu transliteration text: Ek kooch mein pahunch kar dekha hai Mujtaba neZalim ne zarb mari kaise khuda hi jaane
english translation text:
When Imam Hasan arrived at the scene how did he bear to see
The oppressive ruler (la) slapping his mother - Only God knows

urdu transliteration text: Binte nabi zameen par (2) ghash kha ke gir pari haiYe ghurbat e Ali hai
english translation text:
The daughter of the Prophet fell to the ground, unconscious
- This is the tragedy of Imam Ali (as) -

urdu transliteration text: Yeh Ghurbat e Ali hai, Ye Ghurbat e Ali hai
english translation text: This is the tragedy of Imam Ali (as)

urdu transliteration text:
Mazloom e karbala ko yaad aagayi sakinaBeti pe Mustafa ki Qunfuz (la) ka haat utha
Imam Hussainremembered his daughter Sakina
english translation text: When Qunfuz (la) raised his hand on the daughter of the Prophet

urdu transliteration text:
Pehlu mein Murtaza ki (2) talwaar ro padi haiYe ghurbat e Ali hai
While the sword in Imam Ali’s sheath, burst into tears
english translation text: - This is the tragedy of Imam Ali (as) -

urdu transliteration text: Yeh Ghurbat e Ali hai, Ye Ghurbat e Ali hai
english translation text: This is the tragedy of Imam Ali (as)

urdu transliteration text: Pehlu bhi hai shikasta, haato pe bhi hai chaaleHai aap ki amanaat aab aap ke hawale
english translation text:
Her (Zahra's) ribs were broken, his (Imam Ali's) hands are blistered
This is your trust being returned to you

urdu transliteration text: Ye kehke Murtaza ne (2) mayyat Nabi ko di haiYe ghurbat e Ali hai
english translation text:
This is what Imam Ali was saying when lowering her into the grave
- This is the tragedy of Imam Ali (as) -

urdu transliteration text: Yeh Ghurbat e Ali hai, Ye Ghurbat e Ali hai
english translation text: This is the tragedy of Imam Ali (as)

urdu transliteration text:
Kaafi hai bas ye fikra, rone ko zindagi bharHaato ko apne aksar kehte the malke haider
Rubbing his hands together, Imam Ali kept repeating
english translation text: These words will suffice to make you cry for your whole life

urdu transliteration text:
Khaibar shikan ki zauja (2) ghut ghut ke margayi haiYe ghurbat e Ali hai
The wife of Khayber’s hero died in suffering
english translation text: - This is the tragedy of Imam Ali (as) -

urdu transliteration text: Yeh Ghurbat e Ali hai, Ye Ghurbat e Ali hai
english translation text: This is the tragedy of Imam Ali (as)

urdu transliteration text: Kaise likhe Takallum gurbat Ali wali kiZauja sahabiyon ke, darbar mein gayi thi
english translation text:
How can 'Takallum' describe the agony of Imam Ali?
His wife (Zahra) had an audience with the 'companions'

urdu transliteration text: Beti sharaabiyon ke (2) darbaar mein gayi haiYe ghurbat e Ali hai
english translation text:
His daughter (Zainab) had an audience with drunkards
- This is the tragedy of Imam Ali (as) -

urdu transliteration text: Yeh Ghurbat e Ali hai, Ye Ghurbat e Ali hai
english translation text: This is the tragedy of Imam Ali (as)
